---
title: "About Me"
image: headshot.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - href: https://github.com/jagord24
      icon: github
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeffrey-a-gordon/
---

# About Me

## Experience

### KatalystDI

*Supply Chain Analyst, Remote*

## Education

#### M.B.A., Business Analytics

*Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute \| Troy, NY*

#### B.S., Industrial Engineering

*Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute \| Troy, NY*
